name: black tea
summary: Mechanism context: theaflavin/catechin antioxidant signaling, endothelial nitric oxide effects, lipid and blood-pressure pathway modulation. Safety: Caffeine-related insomnia/anxiety/reflux possible; caution with stimulants, iron absorption, and anticoagulant-sensitive users.. Interactions tracked: May interact with stimulants, sedatives, iron supplements.
